positive: A minimalist celestial owl silhouette perched on a crescent moon, rendered in deep indigo and gold foil style. The background features stylized constellations and scattered geometric ormand shapes, suggesting a cosmic night sky. Highly detailed, clean vector style, strong contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, centered composition suitable for apparel printing. Ink bleed effect is minimal and elegant. High contrast, magical realism meets modern graphic design.
